basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Technical Support, Project Nurse Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.post_name: Project Technical Support III, Project Nurse-III, Project Technical Support-II
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has released the official Project Technical Support III / Project Nurse-III / Project Technical Support-II Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the JIPMER Project Technical Support III / Project Nurse-III / Project Technical Support-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in clinical psychology / psychology/ Rehabilitation Psychology, Bachelor's degree in nursing from an Institute recognized by the Nursing Council of India, Three-year graduate degree from a recognized university
qualification.details: Project Technical Support III: Master's degree in clinical psychology / psychology/ Rehabilitation Psychology. Project Nurse-III: Bachelor's degree in nursing from an Institute recognized by the Nursing Council of India. Project Technical Support-II: Three-year graduate degree from a recognized university.

salary_details.details: Project Technical Support III: Rs. 33,600/- per month Project Nurse-III: Rs. 33,600/- per month Project Technical Support-II: Rs. 24,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026 is 13th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of Project Technical Support III, Project Nurse-III, and Project Technical Support-II in JIPMER Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Technical Support III?
faq.answer: For the Project Technical Support III post, candidates must possess a Master's degree in clinical psychology, psychology, or Rehabilitation Psychology from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the JIPMER posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts in JIPMER Recruitment 2026 is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for Project Nurse-III?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Nurse-III position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 33,600/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these JIPMER posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026 will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to qualify in both stages.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email by sending their complete application along with all necessary documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any relaxation in the age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided to candidates as per the prevailing government rules and regulations for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for JIPMER Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
